page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c2.medium is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs, operating with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio. This configuration ensures that each vCPU maps directly to a dedicated physical core without hyperthreading, providing predictable compute performance.

The instance is configured with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 1.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached block storage. There are also zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this instance.

Given the 1:1 ratio of vCPUs to memory, this instance is designed for compute-heavy workloads that require dedicated CPU allocation but have modest memory footprints. It offers qualitative cost efficiency for tasks where CPU execution speed is the primary bottleneck rather than memory capacity or local disk I/O. Suitable workloads include batch processing, CPU-bound microservices, and parallelized computational tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c2.medium is an x86_64 compute-optimized server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs, featuring a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio that eliminates hyperthreading for highly predictable CPU performance. The instance provides 16.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a 1.0 GB per core density. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring external network-attached storage for data persistence. With its dedicated CPU allocation and low memory-to-core ratio, the ecs.c2.medium is designed for compute-intensive workloads with low memory requirements, such as batch processing, distributed analytics, and CPU-bound microservices.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c2.medium is a compute-optimized x86_64 server featuring 16 dedicated physical cores, 16 vCPUs, and 16.0 GB of RAM, designed for compute-intensive workloads without hyperthreading.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c2.medium is a compute-optimized x86_64 instance with 16 dedicated vCPUs, 16.0 GB RAM, and no local storage.
tagline: A compute-optimized x86_64 instance featuring sixteen dedicated physical cores and a one-to-one ratio of gigabytes of memory to vCPUs.
bullet_points: 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs with no hyperthreading
16.0 GB of system memory providing 1.0 GB per core
No local storage or integrated GPU resources included
Optimized for CPU-bound workloads and batch processing
